the word gospel literally means good news and occurs times in the bible exclusively in the new testament. in greek it is the word euaggelion from which we get our english words evangelist evangel and evangelical. the gospel is broadly speaking the whole of scripture more narrowly the gospel is the good news concerning christ and the way of salvation. the key to understanding the gospel is to know why its good news. to do that we must start with the bad news. the old testament law was given to israel during the time of moses deuteronomy . the law can be thought of as a measuring stick and sin is anything that falls short of perfect according to that standard. the righteous requirement of the law is so stringent that no human being could possibly follow it perfectly in letter or in spirit. despite our goodness or badness relative to each other we are all in the same spiritual boatwe have sinned and the punishment for sin is death i.e. separation from god the source of life romans . in order for us to go to heaven gods dwelling place and the realm of life and light sin must be somehow removed or paid for. the law established the fact that cleansing from sin can only happen through the bloody sacrifice of an innocent life hebrews . the gospel involves jesus death on the cross as the sin offering to fulfill the laws righteous requirement romans hebrews . under the law animal sacrifices were offered year after year as a reminder of sin and a symbol of the coming sacrifice of christ hebrews . when christ offered himself at calvary that symbol became a reality for all who would believe hebrews . the work of atonement is finished now and thats good news. the gospel also involves jesus resurrection on the third day. he was delivered over to death for our sins and was raised to life for our justification romans . the fact that jesus conquered sin and death sins penalty is good news indeed. the fact that he offers to share that victory with us is the greatest news no doubt quaideazam muhammad ali jinnahs struggle was never about personal power it was about securing the identity dignity and survival of muslims in the subcontinent. if he had desired power he would have accepted gandhis offer to become the first leader of a united india. but his famous response said it all its not about who will rule. its about who will survive. he knew that without a separate homeland muslims would either be politically dominated culturally erased or drawn into constant conflict within a hindumajority india. islam and hinduism are not just different religions they are complete civilizations with contrasting laws values and ways of life. whether its prayer food festivals like eidulazha or concepts of life and death the differences run deep. without partition events like cow sacrifice would have led to endless communal violence and muslims would always be treated with suspicion or suppressed in policy and culture. jinnah saw this coming. his demand for pakistan was not division it was protection preservation and peace through separation. even today leaders in india rise to power by targeting minorities especially muslims proving that jinnahs fears were not emotional but visionary. pakistan was not just a political move it was a shield for a nations survival. and history has proven it to be one of the most strategic decisions ever made.

the reason why works isnt just because of the method but because in the first case you only have one finger the center of mass is always a point and since youve only got one point of contact where your finger touches the cane there is effectively a chance the center of mass is exactly on that contact point and thus starts leaning towards one side or another if you use the second method theres two points of contact and thus as long as the center of mass is inbetween it cannot tilt you can try finding the center of mass on your own with two fingers together without using the special method and just doing it normally and youll see it works fine tldr you dont need a special method to balance on the center of mass you just need two fingers so that there are two contact points for the center of mass to be between

from experience i am a no good do person. i havent accomplished anything and even if i did i destroyed it by comparing. i felt bad for my achievements at time when no one was there to celebrate it. just so you know the story doesnt end in a bad way i am currently earning more than enough and can give my friends and family gifts whenever they want. i am focussing on my health and food. i am studying while i am working. i have dealt with all kinds of stress. academic stressbiggest challenge of my life never came first always second and my parents at time made it feel like i was failing relationship stress no good rel with my friends even living alone rn financial stress never asked anything from my parents because i knew they couldnt afford it and my parents boasted off about it and even now when i am earning so much i am unable to spend it on myself because it makes me feel guilty somehow health stress i was diagnosed with spinal tuberculosis and was bedridden for years still recovering there was a point i accepted death because dr told us at one point that it could be cancer and went for a biopsy. i wont say i am happy now but i am satisfied with what i have and i look forward to do more but its time we stopped taking stress of something that might not happen.. i am going to stop it as of today and try to live my live if not enjoy then at least focus on whats important for me and what can i do about it. stop thinking about short term goals i mean make goals but keep them malleable there is more than one way to get where you want to be and see the bigger picture and then accomplish them by taking actions. actions are what matters.
